dashboard.heroDescription: Administrative dashboard for the camper rental — a quick overview of activity, fleet, and reservations in one place. This block shows a gradient headline on dark card surfaces.
dashboard.fleetCardBody: Overview of available vehicles, inspections, and statuses — the module will be connected to the API.
dashboard.reservationsCardBody: List of current and upcoming rentals with filtering by date and customer.

fleet.placeholder: Fleet module — camper list and vehicle management coming soon.

reservations.placeholder: Reservations module — list and handling coming soon.
